headline: Airi brings personalized AI companions to the browser
lede: This platform merges WebGPU performance with deep avatar customization, turning the browser into a canvas for digital humans. Users gain full ownership over their AI’s personality, creating a modular bridge between LLMs and real-time interaction.

headline: WiFi DensePose maps movement through wireless signals
lede: Moving beyond traditional cameras, this project captures skeletal data using existing WiFi infrastructure. It provides a non-invasive way to track human movement, perfect for nocturnal monitoring or privacy-conscious spatial analysis.

headline: RuFlo scales multi-agent swarms with Rust-powered consensus
lede: Managing over 60 concurrent agents requires a rigid architectural backbone. RuFlo uses hierarchical topologies and HNSW vector search to ensure that automated swarms remain self-correcting and efficient throughout their lifecycle.

headline: MarkItDown simplifies document processing for RAG pipelines
lede: Structured input is the lifeblood of effective retrieval systems. This utility standardizes complex file formats into clean Markdown, allowing data pipelines to consume unstructured documents with minimal overhead.

headline: DeerFlow 2.0 provides scalable sandbox orchestration for AI
lede: Production-grade autonomy requires memory and isolation. DeerFlow 2.0 delivers a robust infrastructure that bridges the gap between research scripts and resilient, multi-environment agent deployments.

headline: OpenSandbox secures AI execution with isolated container runtimes
lede: Executing untrusted code requires an uncompromising security boundary. By leveraging gVisor and Kata Containers, this platform ensures that high-speed agent operations remain contained and performant within production environments.

headline: Curated LLM apps repository crosses major adoption milestone
lede: This collection serves as the industry standard for those tracking the rapid evolution of generative AI applications. It remains the primary reference point for developers seeking proven implementation patterns in a crowded ecosystem.

headline: Claude scientific skills framework optimizes specialized reasoning
lede: Refining LLM outputs for technical tasks demands rigorous evaluation. This toolset focuses on benchmarking and enhancing model performance within scientific domains, stripping away the noise to favor precise, verifiable results.

headline: Omarchy implements self-hosted control for digital environments
lede: Data sovereignty is a non-negotiable requirement for modern, secure infrastructure. By providing a local-first alternative to cloud-dependent services, this project empowers users to maintain absolute authority over their digital domain.

headline: MobileAgent explores interactive AI navigation for handsets
lede: This prototype sketches out the future of on-device interaction, testing how agents can manipulate mobile interfaces. It is a raw, iterative experiment in bridging the gap between desktop intelligence and mobile utility.
